name: GOLFTEC Santa Monica
about: GOLFTEC is a national provider of high-tech golf instruction and club fitting, utilizing advanced motion measurement technology like OPTIMOTION and high-speed video analysis. The Santa Monica location is a dedicated indoor training studio focused on personalized coaching rather than on-course play or food service. The facility is designed for serious golfers looking to improve their game through data-driven instruction and practice, with pricing based on lesson packages and fitting services.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using launch monitors and video analysis
Personalized coaching plans for all skill levels
Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION for swing analysis
Comprehensive club fitting services with expert fitters
Structured practice memberships with technology access

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors used for data collection and club fitting

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides club rentals and professional club fitting services to help you find the perfect equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No food or beverage service is mentioned, so it appears to be a training-focused facility without concessions.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: Website content doesn't specify simulator session times. It's recommended to book directly with the center for detailed information on simulator usage.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and is designed to accommodate golfers of all skill levels, including beginners and youth players.
